mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUESTION_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N' AND USER_ID = #{userId}
AND CATEGORY = #{category}
SELECT BOARD_NO , USER_ID , TITLE , CATEGORY , CREATE_DATE , CONTENT , UPDATED , DELETED FROM QUESTION_BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
SELECT USER_ID AS userId , DELETED AS deleted FROM QUESTION_BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE QUESTION_BOARD SET DELETED = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE QUESTION_BOARD SET UPDATED = 'COMPLETED' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
